Ocean.name: Ocean Surface floating settlement
Ocean.appearance: salt-weathered colors, wet hair or scales, shell, rope, brass, driftwood, and sky-reflected cyan accents
Ocean.behavior: comfortable with tides, trade routes, storms, floating districts, fishing crews, and maritime diplomacy

Ocean.name: Underwater with reefs
Ocean.appearance: reef-bright patterns, coral motifs, bioluminescent freckles, fin, gill, shell, or scaled details
Ocean.behavior: moves carefully around living coral, reads currents, values reef alliances, and treats water as community memory

Ocean.name: Underwater without reefs
Ocean.appearance: sleek deep-water silhouettes, abyssal blues, silver-gray tones, pressure-adapted features, and dim cyan glow
Ocean.behavior: patient, pressure-tested, navigational, comfortable with darkness, depth, migration, and long-distance survival

Plains.name: Grassland
Plains.appearance: wind-swept hair, reed, leather, dusty greens, storm-grays, amber grasses, and practical travel gear
Plains.behavior: fast-moving, open-sky aware, herd-conscious, practical, and skilled at reading weather over wide land

Plains.name: Prairie
Plains.appearance: sun-browned fabrics, prairie-flower accents, long-distance travel wear, and horizon-colored palettes
Plains.behavior: values endurance, community warning systems, seasonal movement, and cooperation across open territory

Plains.name: Farming
Plains.appearance: earth tones, harvest charms, sturdy boots, aprons, braided practical hair, and signs of daily work
Plains.behavior: community-rooted, seasonal, practical, food-conscious, protective of homes, fields, livestock, and stored supplies

Mountains.name: Mountain range
Mountains.appearance: stone, iron, wool, weathered skin, altitude-ready clothing, and cliff or sky motifs
Mountains.behavior: enduring, challenge-focused, careful with footing, respectful of storms, passes, avalanches, and highland law

Mountains.name: Valley
Mountains.appearance: mixed river-stone, fertile green, mountain wool, and trade-road details
Mountains.behavior: bridge-building, trade-aware, protective of passes and river routes, balanced between highland and lowland customs

Mountains.name: Deep cavern
Mountains.appearance: darkvision-adapted eyes, mineral colors, fungus glows, soot, stone jewelry, and subterranean tools
Mountains.behavior: cautious, echo-aware, secretive, resourceful, and comfortable with tunnels, pressure, darkness, and hidden communities

Forest.name: Deep forest
Forest.appearance: moss greens, bark browns, vine patterns, leaf-shaped jewelry, and quiet camouflage layers
Forest.behavior: observant, patient, territorial about sacred groves, skilled with undergrowth, tracks, birdsong, and moonlit paths

Forest.name: Partial forest
Forest.appearance: forest-edge palettes, mixed town-and-wild clothing, herb bundles, and practical boots
Forest.behavior: adaptable, borderwise, good at mediating between towns, farms, roads, and deeper wild communities

Forest.name: Treetops - treehouses
Forest.appearance: climbing wraps, feather or leaf details, ropework, elevated-platform tools, and canopy-colored markings
Forest.behavior: agile, height-comfortable, socially networked through bridges and platforms, alert to wind, branches, birds, and falls

Forest.name: Marshes and swamps
Forest.appearance: muddy greens, blackwater blues, fungal whites, algae markings, water-slick hair, and soft poisonous warning colors
Forest.behavior: quiet, ambush-aware, rot-and-renewal minded, protective of hidden paths, ancestral pools, and wetland spirits

Forest.name: Rainforest
Forest.appearance: sapphire, sunset orange, orchid purple, vibrant green, and bioluminescent jungle-water markings
Forest.behavior: climbs, listens to rainfall and canopy life, communicates with small creatures and plants, and treats living jungle water as sacred

Hybrid.name: Beach and grass with water
Hybrid.appearance: saltgrass colors, shoreline jewelry, grass-cloak textures, and wet-sand practical clothing
Hybrid.behavior: moves between fishing, grazing, ferries, shore roads, and storm shelters with flexible coastal instincts

Hybrid.name: Beach and reefs with water
Hybrid.appearance: shell, coral, bright reef colors, sun-bleached cloth, and tidal jewelry
Hybrid.behavior: comfortable negotiating between shorefolk and reeffolk, reading tides, and protecting shallow-water communities

Hybrid.name: Hybrid tree and forest floor
Hybrid.appearance: layered canopy-and-root design, bark jewelry, moss wraps, and climbing gear
Hybrid.behavior: balances high canopy movement with root-level tracking, foraging, guardianship, and quiet social warning systems

Hybrid.name: Hybrid farming forest grassland
Hybrid.appearance: harvest colors mixed with leaves, rural tools, sturdy clothes, and woven grass-vine details
Hybrid.behavior: community-focused, practical, seasonal, good at border disputes between farms, woods, grazing land, and village life
